narrative:
Willshire Township has 1,019 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
